description_long: This is a large, modern residential house complex with multiple interconnected structures, surrounded by a fenced yard. The property features a main two-story building with several gabled roofs, large windows, and a spacious backyard with green lawns and palm trees. There is a detached garage with a driveway and a parked car, as well as a smaller outbuilding in the rear corner of the lot. The outdoor area includes paved walkways, a patio with outdoor furniture, and landscaped garden sections. The house has a clean, minimalist design with a focus on geometric forms and open spaces. The overall layout suggests a contemporary suburban home designed for comfort and outdoor living.
description: A large, modern two-story house complex with gabled roofs, expansive windows, a detached garage, and landscaped fenced yard with palm trees and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with car, detached garage, and central patio area with outdoor furniture.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, large windows, patio seating, and a small outbuilding in the back corner.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the house, multiple gabled roofs, and the fenced garden area with palm trees.
description_view_3: Opposite front view focusing on the garage, driveway, and the main house facade with visible entryway and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some grouped in horizontal bands
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, paved approach, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaped elements and open patio.
